nasb.text: When the donkey saw the angel of the Lord, she lay down under Balaam; so Balaam was angry and struck the donkey with his stick.

esv.text: When the donkey saw the angel of the Lord, she lay down under Balaam. And Balaam’s anger was kindled, and he struck the donkey with his staff.

cnv.text: 驢看見了耶和華的使者，就臥在巴蘭身下；巴蘭大怒，就用自己的杖打驢。

ccb.text: 驴看见耶和华的天使，就卧在地上，巴兰大怒，便用杖打它。
